_comment: Endpoint configs for V1 devnet init. Amounts in USDC base units (6 decimals): 1_000 = $0.001. exposureCapPerHourLamports = max payout from this pool per rolling hour. `helius` mirrors the mainnet helius row (2026-05-15). `dummy` is the strict-E2E fixture endpoint — its on-chain params MUST stay byte-equal to scripts/devnet/seed-local-dummy.sql (the proxy prices off the DB row, settle_batch prices off this on-chain EndpointConfig; a mismatch desyncs premium/refund).
